name: upvote-club
description: Promote any link with real engagement: create upvote, like, comment and follow tasks on Upvote.club straight from Claude.
long_description:
Upvote.club is a community-powered promotion platform across 18 platforms.

**Setup:** 1) Register at https://upvote.club 2) MATE plan 3) Generate API key at https://upvote.club/api 4) Paste key here when installing.

Send Claude a link to promote — track progress and cancel tasks (refund unused points) in chat.

tools.name: get_api_reference
tools.description: Full API reference: examples, minimum prices, error catalog

tools.name: list_platforms
tools.description: List supported platforms, actions and minimum prices

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a promotion task — spends account points

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Get progress of one or more promotion tasks

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a promotion task and refund unused points

api_key.title: Upvote.club API Key
api_key.description: Your personal API key from https://upvote.club/api (MATE plan). Register at https://upvote.club, generate the key in the dashboard, paste here. Starts with upv_.
